home.title: LuzCerta
home.subtitle: Friendly Energy Calculator
home.description: Easily find out which appliances might be making your electricity bill more expensive. No technical jargon, no hassle.
home.feature1Desc: Made for people who don't understand energy
home.feature2Desc: Saved in your browser, no sign-up needed
home.feature3Desc: Learn how to reduce your bill

config.title: Set up tariff
config.description: Before we begin, let's set the energy tariff rate. This helps calculate how much each appliance may cost per month.
config.tariffDescription: This value appears on your electricity bill. If you don't know it, you can keep the suggested average of
config.tariffHelp: Look for the kWh rate on your electricity bill.

appliances.title: Choose your appliances
appliances.description: Select the appliances you have at home.
appliances.noResults: No appliances found for this search.
appliances.howMany: How many of this appliance do you have?
appliances.howLong: How long do you use it per day?
appliances.howManyDays: How many days per month do you use it?
appliances.avgHint: Use an average if you're not sure of the exact value.
appliances.wattsHelp: This number usually appears on the appliance label or manual.

myHouse.title: My Home
myHouse.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove
myHouse.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all your home data?
myHouse.clearCount: appliances will be removed and the app will return to its initial state.

results.title: Your estimate results
results.description: See how much each appliance may be adding to your electricity bill.
results.estimateDescription: This is the estimated value of your electricity bill per month.
results.topConsumerAlert: is the appliance that weighs the most on your bill
results.disclaimer: These values are estimates based on average consumption. The actual value of your bill may vary due to taxes, tariff flags, and other fees.
results.emptyDescription: Add appliances to your home to see the consumption estimate.

tips.title: Tips to save energy
tips.chuveiro: Shorter showers can make a big difference on your bill. Every minute less helps save!
tips.arCondicionado: Using the air conditioner for fewer hours or at a moderate temperature (23°C) can significantly reduce consumption.
tips.lampadas: Replacing old bulbs with LED ones can help save energy. A 9W LED provides the same light as a 60W incandescent bulb.
tips.geladeira: Avoid opening the fridge too many times and check the door seals. A fridge with poor seals consumes more.
tips.ferro: Gather plenty of clothes before ironing. Turning the iron on and off multiple times consumes more energy.
tips.televisao: Avoid leaving the TV on when no one is watching. Standby mode also consumes a little.
tips.maquinaLavar: Use the washing machine at full capacity whenever possible. Washing few clothes uses the same energy.
tips.geral: Unplug appliances when not in use. Many consume energy even when turned off (standby mode).

footer.disclaimer: The values shown are estimates based on average consumption. Taxes, tariff flags, and fees may change the actual value of your electricity bill.

empty.title: Your home is still empty
empty.description: Add some appliances to start estimating your electricity bill.

validation.wattsRequired: Check this value. It needs to be greater than zero.
validation.hoursInvalid: The value must be between 0 and 24 hours.
validation.daysInvalid: The value must be between 1 and 31 days.

geladeira.name: Refrigerator
geladeira.description: Runs all the time, but consumes relatively little per hour.

chuveiro-eletrico.name: Electric shower
chuveiro-eletrico.description: One of the most energy-consuming appliances when used for a long time.

maquina-de-lavar.name: Washing machine
maquina-de-lavar.description: Usually used a few times a week, but consumes a lot per cycle.

televisao.name: Television
televisao.description: Low consumption per hour, but can add up if left on all day.

ar-condicionado.name: Air conditioner
ar-condicionado.description: Can significantly increase your bill if used for many hours per day.

ventilador.name: Fan
ventilador.description: Consumes much less than an air conditioner and is a good alternative.

micro-ondas.name: Microwave
micro-ondas.description: Powerful, but since it's used for short periods, it doesn't weigh much on the bill.

ferro-de-passar.name: Iron
ferro-de-passar.description: Consumes a lot while on, but is usually used only a few times per month.

computador.name: Desktop computer
computador.description: Desktop computers consume more than laptops, especially with dedicated graphics cards.

notebook.name: Laptop
notebook.description: Consumes very little compared to a desktop computer.

lampadas.name: Light bulbs
lampadas.description: LED bulbs consume very little. Old incandescent ones use much more.

air-fryer.name: Air fryer
air-fryer.description: Powerful, but since it's used for short periods, the impact tends to be moderate.

forno-eletrico.name: Electric oven
forno-eletrico.description: Consumes a lot when on. Planning usage helps save energy.

freezer.name: Freezer
freezer.description: Like the fridge, it runs all the time but consumes moderately.

roteador-internet.name: Wi-Fi router
roteador-internet.description: Consumes very little. Can stay on all the time without worry.
